scripts.build:desktop: npm run build && npm run build:electron
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run build:electron && electron .
scripts.package:mac:dir: npm run build:desktop && npm run electron:install-app-deps && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --mac --dir
scripts.dist:mac: node scripts/download-whisper-binary.js && npm run build:desktop && npm run electron:install-app-deps && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --mac dmg --universal
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: node scripts/download-whisper-binary.js && npm run build:desktop && npm run electron:install-app-deps && KEEL_MAC_SPLIT=1 electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --mac dmg --arm64
scripts.dist:mac:x64: node scripts/download-whisper-binary.js && npm run build:desktop && npm run electron:install-app-deps && KEEL_MAC_SPLIT=1 electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs --mac dmg --x64
